prestazioni: Engine: L535 (6.2L V12) or L539 (6.5L V12) – Forced induction via Novitec Rosso supercharger kit with custom billet crankshaft (80mm stroke) and forged Mahle pistons (9.5:1 compression), paired with a Garrett GT4202 turbocharger (for hybrid setup) and Novitec’s CNC-ported cylinder heads with titanium valves and upgraded valve springs. Fuel system upgraded to dual Bosch Motorsport 044 high-flow fuel pumps and 1,000cc/min ID1000 injectors, managed by a Motec M150 ECU with custom lambda mapping for E85 compatibility.

Drivetrain: Reinforced OEM 6-speed e-gear transmission with Novitec’s uprated clutch pack (ceramic friction discs) and a Quaife ATB differential. Custom 3.73:1 final drive ratio for optimized acceleration, paired with a Novitec carbon-fiber driveshaft and reinforced half-shafts with CV joints from a Lamborghini Aventador SVJ.

Suspension & Handling: Öhlins TTX46 coilovers with 3-way adjustable damping (compression, rebound, and ride height), custom-valved for Murcielago’s front/rear weight distribution (43/57). Front and rear sway bars replaced with adjustable TTE units (24mm front, 22mm rear), and polyurethane bushings from SuperPro for subframe and control arms. Brembo GT-R 6-piston calipers with 405mm carbon-ceramic rotors (front) and 380mm (rear), paired with Ferodo DS2500 brake pads and stainless steel braided lines.
estetica: Aerodynamics: Novitec Rosso ‘SV-R’ widebody kit with carbon-fiber front splitter, side skirts, and rear diffuser, designed for 20% more downforce at 180 mph. Custom rear wing from RW Carbon (3D-scanned from a Murcielago LP 670-4 SV) with adjustable angle (0-12 degrees) and integrated Gurney flap. Front bumper modified with a 3D-printed air curtain system to reduce drag by 8%.

Wheels & Tires: HRE FF15 3-piece forged wheels (20x9.5 front, 21x12.5 rear) with custom offsets (+25mm front, +35mm rear) to fill the widened fenders. Tires: Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 R (265/30 ZR20 front, 345/25 ZR21 rear) with nitrogen inflation and TPMS sensors. Wheel spacers: H&R 15mm hubcentric spacers (front) and 25mm (rear) for perfect flush fitment.

Exterior & Interior: Full custom paint in ‘Arancio Argentea’ (Lamborghini’s 2006 limited-run color) with a 3-stage PPF (XPEL Ultimate) and ceramic coating (Gyeon Quartz). Engine bay detailed with carbon-fiber intake plenums (Novitec), titanium bolts (ARP), and a custom billet aluminum oil cap (Billetworkz). Interior: Full Alcantara retrim (Rocco Design) with contrast stitching in ‘Giallo Taurus’ (matching OEM color), carbon-fiber door cards (Novitec), and a custom roll cage (Sparco Pro 2000) with harness bar for 6-point Schroth Profi II harnesses.
